spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High data density, strict grid adherence, 1px structural borders.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-px bg-[#262626] border border-[#262626]

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#141414), 1px solid border (#262626), zero shadow. On hover, background shifts to #1F1F1F.
surface_strategies.navigation_sidebar: Solid black (#0A0A0A) background, right border (#262626). Dense item spacing.
surface_strategies.ai_copilot_panel: Uses 'Tracing Beam' or subtle inner glow border (#0A84FF/20) to distinguish from standard data panels.
surface_strategies.modals: Solid surface (#141414), sharp 1px border (#404040), stark backdrop (bg-black/80).

components.buttons: Sharp corners. Primary: white bg, black text. Secondary: transparent bg, 1px border (#404040), white text. Destructive: red bg.
components.badges: Rectangular (rounded-none). Text: xs uppercase. Colors mapped to status with 10% opacity bg and solid text.
components.tables: Dense. No vertical borders. 1px bottom border (#262626) per row. Header text is uppercase, muted, small. Numbers use tabular-nums font-mono.
components.charts: Recharts with matching grid lines (#262626). Use purely status colors or monochrome gradients. No generic multi-colored pie charts.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Weight: 'regular' for dense UI, 'fill' for active state.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Flat background, sharp borders. Focus state: border-white ring-0.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Instant color shifts. No bouncy physics. Professional and snappy.
motion_and_interactions.data_loading: Monospace number scrambling or sharp skeleton blocks (bg-[#1F1F1F]). No soft pulsing.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA compliance. Muted text must be at least #737373 on #0A0A0A.
accessibility.focus_rings: 2px solid white offset by 2px (black bg in between).

brand_logo.description: Abstract geometric white logo for the app header

ai_evidence_graph.description: Abstract dark mode data network graph for AI Copilot/Evidence graph background

command_center_bg.description: Subtle dark texture for login or overarching command center backdrop

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono via Google Fonts or standard imports.
Install Recharts for data visualization: yarn add recharts
Use Shadcn UI extensively but strip out rounded corners (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`) to maintain the rigorous brutalist finance vibe.
The layout should feature a fixed left sidebar (Navigation) and a scrollable main content area. Data grids must utilize 1px borders matching `#262626`.
Data metrics should always use tabular-nums and the Mono font.
Never use soft UI gradients or generic shadows. Rely on sharp contrast and 1px borders for hierarchy.
Include a `data-testid` on all interactive buttons, links, table rows, and form elements.
For the AI Copilot chat interface, differentiate it with monospace citations and a slightly elevated background (`#141414`), omitting generic 'chat bubbles' for a more terminal-like log view.
